notes: Fixed Google Sheets On-the-go OAuth token exchange by removing PKCE from the confidential hosted web-client flow, avoiding missing code_verifier errors after Streamlit session changes.
Kept signed OAuth state verification and On-the-go return context handling from v0.5.76.
Kept Streamlit native OAuth launch buttons for reliable Google redirects.
Kept the Supabase migration and Secret API key access model from v0.5.74.
